title: Issue with foreach[i, j] on queue and dynamic array

features.name: foreach multi-index on dynamic array with variable inner sizes
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop with multiple indices (i, j) operating on a two-dimensional dynamic array where inner arrays have different sizes

features.name: foreach multi-index on queue with variable inner sizes
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop with multiple indices (i, j) operating on a two-dimensional queue where inner queues have different sizes

features.name: nested foreach vs multi-index foreach discrepancy on queue
features.description: Code should include both nested foreach loops and multi-index foreach form on the same queue data structure to demonstrate the discrepancy between the two approaches
